purpose: Initializes the program by accepting current date values and opening output files, checking for any open errors.
Retrieves the next authorization summary segment from IMS, updates counters, writes to output file, and triggers detail processing if applicable.
Closes the output files and displays error messages if the close operation fails based on file status codes.
Terminates the program abnormally with return code 16 when a critical error occurs during file opening in initialization.
Terminates the program abnormally with return code 16 when a critical error occurs during file opening in initialization.
Processes all detail segments for the current summary record by retrieving and writing child segments until no more are found.
Terminates the program abnormally with return code 16 when a failure occurs during retrieval of the summary segment.
Terminates the program abnormally with return code 16 when a failure occurs during retrieval of a detail segment.
